name: Hiap Tong Corporation Ltd.
summary: Hiap Tong Corporation Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides hydraulic lifting and haulage services to marine, petrochemical, and construction industries in Singapore and Malaysia. The company operates in two segments, Leasing and Haulage Services, and Port Services. It engages in the rental of rough terrain, mobile tower, all terrain, telescopic crawler, crawler, and mobile truck cranes; and haulage equipment comprising trailers, prime movers, and lorry cranes. The company also provides labor supply for container lashing/unlashing, prime mover driving services, and ancillary works, as well as repair and maintenance services for motor vehicles. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Singapore. Hiap Tong Corporation Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tembusu Asia Holdings Pte. Ltd.
